crime.value: Serial kidnapping and organ harvesting; method: home invasion with injections to incapacitate victims; question: who is the medical professional conducting these attacks
crime.quote: he just broke into my house and put some injections to my parents

victim.value: Multiple families targeted seemingly at random; victims appear to be chosen for their organs rather than personal reasons
victim.quote: I take peoples body, remove their organs from them and sell it to other countries at high prices

closed_world.value: Medical facilities in specific city blocks (A through F) where the perpetrator must work to have access to medical equipment
closed_world.quote: So he must either be working in Blocks E and F

culprit_and_motive.value: Medical examiner operating from St. Mary's hospital; motive: financial gain from illegal organ trafficking to other countries
culprit_and_motive.quote: I take peoples body, remove their organs from them and sell it to other countries at high prices

resolution.value: Video footage evidence shows the perpetrator harvesting organs; confession obtained through interrogation; criminal sentenced to death
resolution.quote: video footage which showed that he was cutting the body, taking out the organs of the humans

investigator.value: Linda, a teenage civilian who becomes involved when victim Jenny seeks help, leads group of friends in amateur investigation
investigator.quote: Linda with a warm heart let her come inside, gave her a blanket and comforted her

suspect_architecture.value: Single primary suspect: medical examiner working at St. Mary's hospital in Block-E, initially misdirected as having Renfield's Syndrome/clinical vampirism, actually motivated by organ trafficking for money
suspect_architecture.quote: I don't suffer a disease I take peoples body, remove their organs from them and sell it to other countries

red_herring.value: Clinical vampirism/Renfield's Syndrome - perpetrator deliberately staged eating human flesh and timed attacks with moon phases to appear mentally ill rather than reveal organ trafficking motive
red_herring.quote: I pretended to eat the flesh but I didn't eat it instead I threw it from the other side

clue_fairness.value: Video footage of organ removal and body dismemberment presented to both characters and reader simultaneously during interrogation
clue_fairness.quote: video footage which showed that he was cutting the body, taking out the organs of the humans

social_world.value: Medical institutional hierarchy with hospital staff having access to facilities and equipment for organ harvesting; international black market networks for organ sales
social_world.quote: sell it to other countries at high prices

reveal_mechanic.value: Video surveillance footage showing actual organ harvesting operation, forcing confession when physical evidence contradicts the mental illness defense
reveal_mechanic.quote: He was asked to give the answer to the video footage which showed that he was cutting the body

media_and_audience.value: Supernatural/medical folklore of vampirism used to mask criminal enterprise; higher judiciary and police officers as institutional audience for final revelation
media_and_audience.quote: It's a myth that the addiction increases on the new moon and full moon days

_meta.title: ebook glary woods blood thirsty two faced medical examiner 1
